title: Principal audit post-ticket-322 checkpoint
problem: Tickets 320–322 completed the public atlas preview thread (JSON refresh, page copy, fixtures reference). Cadence rule requires a principal audit after ≥3 consecutive done tickets since the last checkpoint (pre-ticket-320).

No implementation code changes beyond audit runner/docs if needed.
